title: SPAIN enforcement action against CUMACA MOTOR, S.L. (6,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Spanish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 6,000 on CUMACA MOTOR, S.L. The controller required a data subject to provide a national identity document, which it copied for the purpose of a vehicle repair. The controller claimed that this was a requirement of the insurance company, which was payin...
